metadata.title: create-diagram
metadata.description: Create an architecture or design diagram that explains a selected system view.

command.goal:
Create an architecture or design diagram that explains a selected system view.
## Usage
/create-diagram <source-artifact> [<diagram-type>]
## Accepted Inputs
- Issue, approved design, ADR, specification, plan, or repository architecture - Optional diagram type: sequence, class, state machine, ER, or C4 - Desired audience and level of detail
## Owning Agent
@robot-architect
## Associated Skill
`033-architecture-diagrams`

step.step-content: Confirm purpose, audience, type, and scope.
Generate diagram source using repository conventions.
Check names and relationships against source artifacts.

output-format-list.output-format-item: Diagram source for selected architecture view

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Do not invent components or interactions.
Do not replace an existing diagram without review.
